title: Raciborskanthos muticus
intro: I couldn't find any information about the plant Raciborskanthos muticus.
taxonomy: Raciborskanthos muticus is classified as a species of fungus in the genus Raciborskanthos. The genus Raciborskanthos belongs to the family Gnomoniaceae, which is a group of fungi that are primarily saprotrophic. The family Gnomoniaceae is part of the order Diaporthales, which includes various types of fungi that are often parasitic or saprotrophic. The order Diaporthales is within the class Sordariomycetes, a large and diverse group of fungi. The class Sordariomycetes is part of the phylum Ascomycota, which is a major group of fungi that includes many species of mushrooms and molds.
